manifest.desc: A JSON app manifest encoded as a string. This manifest **must** use a valid app manifest schema - read our guide to creating one.

team_id.desc: When called with an org token, which specific team to create app on

desc: Create an app from an app manifest.

errors.dynamic_client_registration_failed: Dynamic client registration failed for an MCP server that requires OAuth authentication.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_invalid_redi: The remote server rejected Slack's redirect URI during Dynamic Client Registration. The server must allowlist https://oauth2.slack.com/external/auth/callback as a valid redirect URI.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_invalid_resp: The MCP server returned an invalid response during Dynamic Client Registration.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_missing_oaut: The MCP server's OAuth metadata is missing a required authorization or token endpoint.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_not_supporte: The MCP server's OAuth metadata does not include a registration endpoint. The server may not support Dynamic Client Registration.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_rejected: The MCP server rejected the Dynamic Client Registration request.
errors.failed_adding_collaborator: Failed writing a collaborator record for this new app
errors.failed_creating_app: Failed to create the app model
errors.failed_generating_app_token: App level token failed to generate.
errors.invalid_app: An app created from the provided manifest would not be valid.
errors.invalid_manifest: The provided manifest file does not validate against schema. Consult the additional errors field to locate specific issues.
errors.invalid_team_id: The provided team ID is not valid
errors.managed_app_limit_reached: The manager app has reached the maximum number of managed apps it can create.
errors.not_in_team: Cannot create an app in a team that user is not a member of
errors.oauth_metadata_not_found: Could not discover OAuth metadata for the MCP server. Ensure the server exposes a .well-known/oauth-authorization-server or .well-known/openid-configuration endpoint.
errors.socket_mode_not_enabled: Socket mode is not enabled in manifest.
